hypothesis: A multi-modal MOF model that jointly encodes MOFid-based text representations (augmented with PubChem/PMC context) and a differentiable 3D crystal graph encoder will achieve significantly lower MAE in QMOF and hMOF adsorption-property predictions than a text-only LLM, with larger gains in low-SFT-data regimes and improved generalization to MOFs with unseen topologies.
